phase_name: Bug Fixes: Store Disambiguation, Rarity Logic, Art Migration, Stale Signals

completed_tasks.name: UI-SPEC.md -- design contract approved (5/6 PASS, 1 FLAG)

decisions.decision: Store disambiguation uses slug-derived street name + city
decisions.rationale: Slug is Culver's own identifier. Format: 'Mineral Point Rd - Madison, WI'. Only disambiguate when multiple stores share a city. Apply everywhere consistently.

Gate 1: min 10 appearances / 90 days (data quality). Gate 2: >100 stores in 30 days = not rare (network-wide). Gate 3: Ultra Rare >150d, Rare 90-150d (higher thresholds). Kills Turtle/Caramel Pecan false positives.
buildRarityNudge() is redundant with per-row badges. Keep inline badges only.

decisions.decision: Insight card only for today's flavor
decisions.rationale: DOW pattern signal only renders if signal flavor matches today's actual FOTD. No fallback to other flavors.
Same L5 PNG + L0 SVG fallback as hero card. CSS handles sizing.

decisions.decision: Widget: fix PNG loading AND improve fallback
decisions.rationale: Debug getConeImage() runtime failures. Also improve DrawContext fallback to look like cone art, not map pins.

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 33.1 to create executable plans from CONTEXT.md and UI-SPEC.md
context_notes: Phase 33.1 inserted after Phase 33 (Performance). Seven user-reported bugs triaged from screenshots. Deep rarity analysis completed by background agent -- recommended hybrid three-gate system. CONTEXT.md and UI-SPEC.md both approved. Phase 34 (Social Sharing) remains paused at plan 0/5. Ready for planning.
